title: equisetum hyemale f. doellii
intro: Equisetum hyemale f. doellii, commonly known as the scouring rush, is a perennial plant belonging to the horsetail family (Equisetaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Equisetum hyemale f. doellii include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce the risk of kidney stones, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall health and wellness.
